name: flow-code
description: Zero-dependency planning + execution with .flow/ task tracking and Ralph autonomous mode (multi-model review gates). Worker subagent per task with git worktree isolation for parallel execution. Auto-detected stack profiles with one-command guard (test/lint/typecheck). Memory v2 with atomic entries, dedup, and progressive disclosure. TDD enforcement mode. Multi-epic queue with dependency visualization. Systematic debugging with root-cause-first enforcement. Includes 20 subagents, 18 commands, 20 skills.
